message:
feat(tests): add pure-function tests for dashboard panels

Add tests for internal/tui/dashboard/panels improving coverage from 59.9% to 63.4%:

- ensemble_test.go: Tests for minInt, maxInt, shortenPaneName, assignmentStatusIcon,
  assignmentProgress, summarizeAssignmentStatus, formatTimeAgo, ensembleConfig,
  and NewEnsemblePanel

- ratelimit_test.go: Tests for min, formatLastActivity, shortAgentType,
  getOAuthIcon, getRateLimitIcon, rateLimitConfig, NewRateLimitPanel,
  SetData, and HasError

- spawn_test.go: Tests for formatDuration, spawnConfig, SpawnData.IsComplete,
  SpawnData.SentCount, SpawnData.PendingCount, NewSpawnPanel, IsActive,
  SetData, and Keybindings

All tests follow project conventions: table-driven, t.Parallel(), no mocks.

Closes bd-2it5g

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
